name: Carrots (Glazed Style)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Apple Juice, Frozen -- Concentrate -- thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam carrots for 15 minutes or until tender.
2. Combine apple juice, orange rind, cornstarch, and cloves in a large saucepan.
3. Mix until smooth, then cook and stir constantly until the mixture has thickened and cleared.
4. Add cooked carrots to the sauce.
5. Serve hot.
